message:
feat(lab): implement InstrumentedFuture for await point tracking

Add InstrumentedFuture wrapper that tracks await points during polling
and supports cancellation injection for testing cancellation-correctness:

- AwaitPoint: identifies specific await locations with task_id + sequence
- InjectionStrategy: Never, AtSequence, AtPoint, EveryNth modes
- CancellationInjector: records await points and controls injection
- InstrumentedFuture: pin-projected wrapper implementing Future

This enables deterministic cancellation testing by recording all await
points in a first pass, then replaying with injection at specific points.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -25,6 +25,7 @@ crossbeam-queue = "0.3"
 parking_lot = "0.12"
 polling = "2.8"
 slab = "0.4"
+pin-project = "1.1"
 rmp-serde = "1.3"
 serde = { version = "1.0", features = ["derive"] }
 serde_json = "1.0"
